description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern, minimalist design, suitable for urban public spaces or communal areas. The lounge features a combination of dark and medium gray upholstery, with a distinct corner section that connects two long seating arms. The seat cushions are thick and appear firmly padded, while the backrests are straight and uniform in height, providing consistent support along the entire length. The lounge is elevated on slender, black metal legs, giving it a light, airy appearance and making cleaning underneath easy. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure suggests durability and comfort, ideal for group seating in parks, plazas, or modern waiting areas.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional lounge with smooth gray upholstery, straight backrests, and slender black metal legs, designed for modern urban spaces.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped configuration, with both seating arms and the connecting corner clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of one arm and the straight, uniform backrest, with the corner section partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the other arm's length and the consistent backrest height, with the corner section at the far end.
description_view_3: Reverse top-down view showing the L-shape from the opposite angle, with the corner and both arms visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple attached seat and back cushions along both arms and the corner, all uniform in size and thickness, forming a continuous seating surface.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, uniform-height backrest running along both arms and the corner, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; the lounge has open ends with no raised armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Slender, straight black metal legs, evenly spaced, of medium height, with a minimalist design and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
